output_structured_natural_language: while PSVMode & breathingCycleStart, always satisfy minExpiratoryTime_equalTo_inspClock_divideBy_2 & minExpiratoryTime_greaterThanOrEqual_0_4 & minExpiratoryTime_lessThanOrEqual_2
